761.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Mughaffal (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Between each pair of calls to prayer (adhan and iqamah) there is a prayer — three times — for whoever wishes.'
761.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Mughaffal (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Di antara setiap dua seruan (adzan dan iqamah) terdapat shalat — tiga kali — bagi siapa yang menginginkannya.'

762.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the companions of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to rush for the pillars (of the mosque) when they heard the adhan, until the Prophet ﷺ came out and found them like that. He said: 'I see you have become enthusiastic.' He seldom spent much time (before coming out).
762.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa para sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berlomba menuju tiang-tiang (masjid) ketika mereka mendengar adzan, hingga Nabi ﷺ keluar dan mendapati mereka demikian. Beliau bersabda: 'Aku melihat kalian sudah bersemangat.' Beliau jarang menghabiskan banyak waktu (sebelum keluar).

763.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to pray two light rak'ahs before Fajr, and she mentioned that he recited in them: 'Say: O you disbelievers' (Surah al-Kafirun) and 'Say: He is Allah, One' (Surah al-Ikhlas).
763.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat dua rakaat ringan sebelum Subuh, dan ia menyebutkan bahwa beliau membaca di dalamnya: 'Katakanlah: Wahai orang-orang kafir' (Surah al-Kafirun) dan 'Katakanlah: Dialah Allah, Yang Maha Esa' (Surah al-Ikhlas).

764.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hafsah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to pray two light rak'ahs after the dawn had broken.
764.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hafsah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat dua rakaat ringan setelah fajar menyingsing.

765.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hafsah, wife of the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with her), that she said: 'When the muezzin fell silent at the adhan of Fajr and the dawn appeared, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would pray two light rak'ahs.'
765.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hafsah, istri Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha), bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika muadzin diam setelah adzan Subuh dan fajar tampak, Rasulullah ﷺ akan shalat dua rakaat yang ringan.'

766.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to pray at night two rak'ahs at a time, then conclude with one.
766.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat di malam hari dua rakaat demi dua rakaat, kemudian menutup dengan satu rakaat.

767.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hafsah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to pray two rak'ahs when the dawn brightened.
767.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hafsah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat dua rakaat ketika fajar menjadi terang.

768.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had prayed the two rak'ahs before Fajr, if he had some need he would speak to me; otherwise he would lie on his right side until the muezzin came to him.'
768.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ selesai shalat dua rakaat sebelum Subuh, jika beliau memiliki suatu keperluan beliau akan berbicara kepadaku; jika tidak, beliau berbaring pada sisi kanannya hingga muadzin datang menemuinya.'

769.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ used to pray between Isha and Fajr eleven rak'ahs, giving salam after every two rak'ahs, and concluding with a single rak'ah of witr. Then he would lie on his right side until the muezzin came to him for Fajr, and he would pray two light rak'ahs.'
769.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat antara Isya dan Subuh sebelas rakaat, memberi salam setelah setiap dua rakaat, dan menutup dengan satu rakaat witr. Kemudian beliau berbaring pada sisi kanannya hingga muadzin datang menemuinya untuk Subuh, dan beliau shalat dua rakaat yang ringan.'

770.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When the iqamah is called, there is no prayer except the obligatory.'
770.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila iqamah dikumandangkan, tidak ada shalat kecuali shalat wajib.'

771.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ saw a man praying two rak'ahs (of sunnah Fajr) after the iqamah. After the Prophet ﷺ completed his prayer, the people surrounded the man. The Prophet ﷺ said to him: 'Are you praying Fajr four rak'ahs?'
771.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ melihat seorang laki-laki shalat dua rakaat (sunnah Subuh) setelah iqamah. Setelah Nabi ﷺ menyelesaikan shalatnya, orang-orang mengelilingi laki-laki itu. Nabi ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Apakah kamu shalat Subuh empat rakaat?'

772.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When the iqamah is called, there is no prayer except the obligatory.'
772.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila iqamah dikumandangkan, tidak ada shalat kecuali shalat wajib.'

773.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym ibn Hammar al-Ghatafani (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Allah the Exalted says: O son of Adam, pray four rak'ahs for Me at the beginning of the day and I will suffice you for the rest of it.'
773.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aym ibn Hammar al-Ghatafani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah Yang Maha Tinggi berfirman: Wahai anak Adam, shalatlah empat rakaat untukku di awal hari dan Aku akan mencukupimu untuk sisa harimu.'

774.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said no one reported that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed the Duha prayer except Umm Hani', for she reported that on the day of the conquest of Mecca he bathed in her house, then prayed eight rak'ahs. She said: 'I never saw him pray a lighter prayer than those, but he completed the bowing and prostrating fully.'
774.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata tidak ada yang melaporkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ shalat Dhuha kecuali Umm Hani', karena ia melaporkan bahwa pada hari penaklukan Makkah beliau mandi di rumahnya, kemudian shalat delapan rakaat. Dia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah melihat beliau shalat yang lebih ringan dari itu, tetapi beliau menyempurnakan ruku dan sujudnya.'

775.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani' (may Allah be pleased with her) that on the day of the conquest of Mecca she saw the Prophet ﷺ bathing while his daughter Fatimah screened him with a cloth. She greeted him in the morning while he bathed. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked: 'Who is this?' She said: 'I am Umm Hani'.' He said: 'Welcome, Umm Hani'.' Then she mentioned what happened.
775.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani' (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa pada hari penaklukan Makkah, ia melihat Nabi ﷺ mandi sementara putrinya Fatimah menutupinya dengan kain. Dia menyambut beliau di pagi hari ketika beliau mandi. Rasulullah ﷺ bertanya: 'Siapa ini?' Dia berkata: 'Aku Umm Hani'.' Beliau bersabda: 'Selamat datang, Umm Hani'.' Kemudian dia menceritakan apa yang terjadi.

776.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Hani' (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'O Messenger of Allah, my maternal cousin claims he will kill a man I have given protection to — one of the sons of Hubayrah.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'We grant protection to whom you have given protection, O Umm Hani'.'
776.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Hani' (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, sepupu ibuku mengklaim akan membunuh seorang laki-laki yang telah aku beri perlindungan — salah satu dari putra-putra Hubayrah.' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kami memberikan perlindungan kepada orang yang kamu telah beri perlindungan, wahai Umm Hani'.'

777.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'My close friend advised me with three things I will not abandon until I die: fasting three days of every month, praying two rak'ahs of Duha, and performing witr before sleeping.'
777.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Sahabat karibku (Nabi ﷺ) menasehatiku dengan tiga hal yang tidak akan aku tinggalkan sampai aku meninggal: puasa tiga hari setiap bulan, shalat dua rakaat Dhuha, dan melakukan witr sebelum tidur.'

778.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never prayed the Duha prayer, whether traveling or at home.'
778.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah shalat Dhuha, baik dalam perjalanan maupun di rumah.'

779.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi Bakrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that his father saw people praying the Duha prayer and said: 'They are praying a prayer that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not pray, nor most of his companions.'
779.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abd al-Rahman ibn Abi Bakrah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ayahnya melihat orang-orang shalat Dhuha dan berkata: 'Mereka sedang shalat sebuah shalat yang Rasulullah ﷺ tidak mengerjakannya, tidak pula kebanyakan sahabatnya.'

780.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ came out to them while they were praying after the sun had risen and said: 'The prayer of the oft-repentant is when the young camels feel the heat of the ground.'
780.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ keluar menemui mereka sementara mereka sedang shalat setelah matahari terbit dan bersabda: 'Shalat orang-orang yang banyak bertaubat adalah ketika anak-anak unta merasakan panasnya tanah.'

781.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Voluntary prayers at night and by day are performed two rak'ahs at a time.'
781.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat-shalat sunnah di malam hari dan di siang hari dilakukan dua rakaat demi dua rakaat.'

782.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about the prayer at night. He said: 'Two rak'ahs at a time. When one of you fears the approach of Fajr, let him pray one rak'ah which will make odd all that he has prayed.'
782.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang shalat malam. Beliau bersabda: 'Dua rakaat demi dua rakaat. Apabila salah seorang dari kalian takut Subuh akan tiba, hendaklah ia shalat satu rakaat yang akan menjadikan ganjil semua yang telah ia shalat.'

783.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abd Allah ibn Salam (may Allah be pleased with him) that when the Messenger of Allah ﷺ arrived in Madinah, people rushed to see him, saying: 'The Messenger of Allah has come!' He went out with those who went out, and when he saw his face he knew it was not the face of a liar. The first thing he heard the Messenger ﷺ say was: 'O people, spread the salutation of peace, feed food, keep family ties, and pray at night while people sleep — you will enter Paradise in peace.'
783.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abd Allah ibn Salam (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika Rasulullah ﷺ tiba di Madinah, orang-orang bergegas melihatnya, mengatakan: 'Rasulullah telah datang!' Dia keluar bersama mereka yang keluar, dan ketika dia melihat wajahnya dia tahu itu bukan wajah seorang pendusta. Hal pertama yang ia dengar dari Rasulullah ﷺ adalah: 'Wahai manusia, sebarkanlah salam, berikan makanan, jalinlah silaturahmi, dan shalatlah di malam hari ketika orang-orang tidur — kalian akan masuk surga dengan selamat.'

784.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man said: 'I heard my beloved Abu al-Qasim ﷺ say: There is no servant who prostrates to Allah one prostration but Allah raises him by it one degree and removes from him by it one sin.'
784.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang laki-laki berkata: 'Aku mendengar kekasihku Abu al-Qasim ﷺ bersabda: Tidak ada hamba yang bersujud kepada Allah satu kali sujud melainkan Allah mengangkatnya dengannya satu derajat dan menghapuskan darinya satu dosa.'

785.iwh_en: It was narrated that Ibn Abi Awfa (may Allah be pleased with him) prayed two rak'ahs and said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed Duha two rak'ahs when he received glad tidings of the conquest (of Mecca), or of the head of Abu Jahl.'
785.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Ibn Abi Awfa (radhiyallahu 'anhu) shalat dua rakaat dan berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ shalat Dhuha dua rakaat ketika beliau menerima kabar gembira tentang penaklukan (Makkah), atau tentang kepala Abu Jahl.'

786.iwh_en: It was narrated from Mu'adh ibn Jabal (may Allah be pleased with him) that when he returned from al-Sham he prostrated to the Prophet ﷺ. The Prophet said: 'What is this, O Mu'adh?' He said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I went to al-Sham and saw them prostrating to their leaders, and I wished to do so for you.' He said: 'If I were to order anyone to prostrate to anyone, I would have ordered women to prostrate to their husbands, because of the great rights they have over them.'
786.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Mu'adh ibn Jabal (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika ia kembali dari Syam ia bersujud kepada Nabi ﷺ. Nabi bersabda: 'Apa ini, wahai Mu'adh?' Dia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, aku pergi ke Syam dan melihat mereka bersujud kepada pemimpin-pemimpin mereka, dan aku ingin melakukannya kepadamu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Jika aku memerintahkan siapapun untuk bersujud kepada siapapun, aku akan memerintahkan perempuan-perempuan untuk bersujud kepada suami-suami mereka, karena besarnya hak mereka atas mereka.'

787.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man (may Allah be pleased with him) who came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, permit me — I wish to prostrate to you.' He said: 'If I were to command anyone to prostrate to anyone, I would command a woman to prostrate to her husband because of the great right he has over her.'
787.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki (radhiyallahu 'anhu) yang datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, izinkanlah aku — aku ingin bersujud kepadamu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Jika aku memerintahkan siapapun untuk bersujud kepada siapapun, aku akan memerintahkan seorang perempuan untuk bersujud kepada suaminya karena besarnya hak yang ia miliki atasnya.'

788.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ recited Surah al-Najm and prostrated in it, and everyone present prostrated except an old man who took a handful of pebbles and raised them to his forehead and said: 'This suffices me.'
788.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ membaca Surah al-Najm dan bersujud di dalamnya, dan setiap orang yang hadir bersujud kecuali seorang laki-laki tua yang mengambil segenggam kerikil dan mengangkatnya ke dahinya dan berkata: 'Ini cukup bagiku.'

789.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that one day the Prophet ﷺ recited Surah Sad (38) and when he reached the place of prostration he came down and prostrated and we prostrated with him. He recited it another time and when he reached the prostration, we prepared to prostrate. When he saw us, he said: 'This (prostration in Surah Sad) is the repentance of a prophet — I only did it as a repentance (prostration).'
789.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa suatu hari Nabi ﷺ membaca Surah Shad (38) dan ketika mencapai tempat sujud, beliau turun dan bersujud dan kami bersujud bersamanya. Beliau membacanya sekali lagi dan ketika mencapai sujud, kami bersiap untuk bersujud. Ketika beliau melihat kami, beliau bersabda: 'Ini (sujud dalam Surah Shad) adalah taubat seorang nabi — aku hanya melakukannya sebagai sujud taubat.'

790.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said about the prostration in Surah Sad: 'It is not among the mandatory prostrations, but I have seen the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prostrate in it.'
790.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata tentang sujud dalam Surah Shad: 'Ini bukan termasuk sujud yang wajib, tetapi aku telah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ bersujud di dalamnya.'

791.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he prostrated in Surah 'Idha al-sama'u inshaqqat' (al-Inshiqaq). He was asked: 'You prostrate in a surah in which no prostration is done?' He said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prostrate in it.'
791.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bersujud dalam Surah 'Idha al-sama'u inshaqqat' (al-Insyiqaq). Dia ditanya: 'Kamu bersujud dalam surah yang di dalamnya tidak ada sujud?' Dia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ bersujud di dalamnya.'

792.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'If I had not seen the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prostrate in it (Surah al-Inshiqaq), I would not have prostrated.'
792.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Jika aku tidak melihat Rasulullah ﷺ bersujud di dalamnya (Surah al-Insyiqaq), aku tidak akan bersujud.'

793.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Bakr ibn Muhammad ibn Amr ibn Hazm (may Allah be pleased with him) that the prostrations of the Quran are fifteen, including three in the Mufassal surahs (short surahs at the end of the Quran) and one at the end of Surah al-Hajj.
793.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Bakr ibn Muhammad ibn Amr ibn Hazm (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa sujud-sujud Al-Quran ada lima belas, termasuk tiga di surah-surah Mufassal (surah-surah pendek di akhir Al-Quran) dan satu di akhir Surah al-Hajj.

794.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We prostrated with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in 'Idha al-sama'u inshaqqat' (al-Inshiqaq) and 'Iqra' bismi Rabbik' (al-Alaq).'
794.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami bersujud bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dalam 'Idha al-sama'u inshaqqat' (al-Insyiqaq) dan 'Iqra' bismi Rabbik' (al-'Alaq).'

795.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I recited Surah al-Najm to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he did not prostrate in it.'
795.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku membaca Surah al-Najm kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau tidak bersujud di dalamnya.'

796.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ used to pray between Isha and Fajr eleven rak'ahs, giving salam after every two rak'ahs, and concluding with a witr of one rak'ah. Then he would lie on his right side until the call for prayer came.'
796.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat antara Isya dan Subuh sebelas rakaat, memberi salam setelah setiap dua rakaat, dan menutup dengan witr satu rakaat. Kemudian beliau berbaring pada sisi kanannya hingga panggilan shalat datang.'

797.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) about the night prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ used to pray thirteen rak'ahs: he prayed eight rak'ahs then performed witr, then prayed two rak'ahs sitting, then when the muezzin called for the Fajr prayer he stood and prayed two light rak'ahs.'
797.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) tentang shalat malam Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ biasa shalat tiga belas rakaat: beliau shalat delapan rakaat kemudian witr, kemudian shalat dua rakaat duduk, kemudian ketika muadzin memanggil shalat Subuh beliau berdiri dan shalat dua rakaat yang ringan.'

798.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that six of the companions of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wished to remain awake in prayer throughout the night on his behalf, but he forbade them and said: 'Is there not a good example in me?'
798.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa enam orang sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ ingin berjaga semalam suntuk dalam ibadah atas nama beliau, tetapi beliau melarang mereka dan bersabda: 'Apakah tidak ada contoh yang baik padaku?'

799.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn Hisham (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked Aisha about the night prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. She said: 'Do you not recite Surah al-Muzzammil?' He said: 'Yes.' She said: 'Allah the Mighty revealed the beginning of that surah and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and his companions performed it for a year, until the end of it was revealed, and Allah made it easier.'
799.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn Hisyam (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Aisyah tentang shalat malam Rasulullah ﷺ. Dia berkata: 'Apakah kamu tidak membaca Surah al-Muzzammil?' Dia berkata: 'Ya.' Dia berkata: 'Allah Yang Maha Perkasa menurunkan awal surah itu dan Rasulullah ﷺ serta para sahabatnya melakukannya selama satu tahun, hingga akhirnya diturunkan, dan Allah memudahkannya.'

800.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn Hisham (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked Aisha about the night prayer, and she said: 'Do you not recite: O you wrapped in garments? (al-Muzzammil).' He said: 'Yes.' She said: 'Then that is the night prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
800.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn Hisyam (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Aisyah tentang shalat malam, dan dia berkata: 'Apakah kamu tidak membaca: Wahai orang yang berselimut? (al-Muzzammil).' Dia berkata: 'Ya.' Dia berkata: 'Maka itulah shalat malam Rasulullah ﷺ.'

801.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn Hisham (may Allah be pleased with him) that after speaking with Aisha he said: 'If I had known you would not enter to her, I would not have told you.'
801.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn Hisyam (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa setelah berbicara dengan Aisyah ia berkata: 'Jika aku tahu kamu tidak akan menemuinya, aku tidak akan memberitahumu.'

802.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'The best prayer after the obligatory is prayer in the depth of the night.'
802.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat terbaik setelah shalat wajib adalah shalat di kedalaman malam.'

803.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Whoever falls asleep and misses his regular nightly portion (of Quran recitation or prayer), or part of it, and reads it between Fajr and Dhuhr, it will be recorded for him as if he had read it at night.'
803.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang tertidur dan melewatkan bagian malamnya yang biasa (dari bacaan Al-Quran atau shalat), atau sebagiannya, dan membacanya antara Subuh dan Dzhuhur, maka akan dicatat untuknya seakan-akan ia telah membacanya di malam hari.'

804.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Allah descends to the lowest heaven every night in the last third of the night and says: 'Who is calling on Me that I may respond to him? Who is asking of Me that I may give him? Who is seeking My forgiveness that I may forgive him?''
804.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah turun ke langit dunia setiap malam pada sepertiga malam terakhir dan berfirman: 'Siapa yang berdoa kepada-Ku agar Aku mengabulkannya? Siapa yang meminta dari-Ku agar Aku memberikannya? Siapa yang memohon ampun kepada-Ku agar Aku mengampuninya?''

805.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Our Lord, Blessed is His Name, descends every night when the last third of the night remains and says: 'Is there anyone calling on Me that I may answer him? Is there anyone asking of Me that I may give him? Is there anyone seeking My forgiveness that I may forgive him?''
805.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Rabb kita, Maha Suci nama-Nya, turun setiap malam ketika sepertiga malam terakhir tersisa dan berfirman: 'Adakah seseorang yang berdoa kepada-Ku agar Aku menjawabnya? Adakah seseorang yang meminta dari-Ku agar Aku memberikannya? Adakah seseorang yang memohon ampun kepada-Ku agar Aku mengampuninya?''

806.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jubayr ibn Mut'im (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Allah descends every night to the lowest heaven and says: 'Is there anyone who asks that I may give him? Is there anyone who seeks My forgiveness that I may forgive him?''
806.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jubayr ibn Mut'im (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah turun setiap malam ke langit dunia dan berfirman: 'Adakah seseorang yang meminta agar Aku memberikannya? Adakah seseorang yang memohon ampun kepada-Ku agar Aku mengampuninya?''

807.iwh_en: It was narrated from Rifa'ah ibn Arabah al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When half or two-thirds of the night passes, Allah descends to the lowest heaven and says: 'Is there not a petitioner to Me, that I might grant him? Is there not one who asks forgiveness, that I might forgive him?' This continues until dawn.'
807.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Rifa'ah ibn Arabah al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika setengah atau dua pertiga malam telah berlalu, Allah turun ke langit dunia dan berfirman: 'Adakah yang berdoa kepada-Ku, agar Aku mengabulkannya? Adakah yang memohon ampun, agar Aku mengampuninya?' Ini berlanjut hingga fajar.'

808.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ali ibn Abi Talib (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When a third of the night or half of it passes, the descent (of Allah to the lowest heaven) occurs.'
808.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ali ibn Abi Talib (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika sepertiga malam atau setengahnya telah berlalu, turunlah (Allah ke langit dunia).'

809.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Were it not that I would burden my community, I would have commanded them to delay Isha and to perform the tooth-stick (siwak) at every prayer.'
809.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seandainya tidak memberatkan umatku, aku pasti akan memerintahkan mereka untuk menunda Isya dan menggunakan siwak di setiap shalat.'

810.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he stood for the night vigil prayer would say: 'O Allah, to You belongs all praise. You are the Light of the heavens and the earth and all that is in them. To You belongs all praise. You are the Truth; Your promise is true; Your words are true; the meeting with You is true; Paradise is true; the Fire is true; the Hour is true. O Allah, to You I surrender, in You I believe...'
810.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ketika berdiri untuk shalat malam, mengucapkan: 'Ya Allah, bagi-Mu segala pujian. Engkau adalah cahaya langit dan bumi serta segala yang ada di dalamnya. Bagi-Mu segala pujian. Engkau adalah Yang Haq; janji-Mu adalah benar; firman-Mu adalah benar; pertemuan dengan-Mu adalah benar; surga adalah benar; neraka adalah benar; Kiamat adalah benar. Ya Allah, kepada-Mu aku berserah diri, kepada-Mu aku beriman...'
